title: Simple cantilevering canopy analysis
description_for_llm: Linear elastic (Theory I) analysis of a cantilevering canopy of beam members supported on columns along one edge. Use for bus stop, entrance, or roof overhang type structures where members cantilever from a supported line. Assumptions: member axes are straight curves in metres, supports at column bases only, moment carrying joints, one steel section for all members, static vertical loads plus self weight. Limits: cantilevers are deflection critical, and the template checks displacement but not vibration or ponding; no uplift or wind suction case, which often governs real canopies; no second order effects. NOT YET AUDITED: the GHX has no ALMOND_IN_*/ALMOND_OUT_* harness params, so run_definition will refuse it. Retrieval context only until harnessed.

inputs.name: ALMOND_IN_LINES
inputs.description: Canopy member axis curves (columns and cantilever beams), node-merged at joints.

inputs.name: ALMOND_IN_LOAD_KN
inputs.description: Vertical load applied at the canopy tip nodes.

outputs.name: ALMOND_OUT_DISP_MM
outputs.description: Largest nodal displacement, normally at the cantilever tip.

outputs.name: ALMOND_OUT_UTIL
outputs.description: Utilization ratio per element, 1.0 means at capacity.

outputs.name: ALMOND_OUT_MASS_KG
outputs.description: Total structural mass of the model.
